news.title: Xi warns Trump: Mishandling Taiwan will put U.S.-China relationship in 'great jeopardy'
news.summary: President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning. The high-stakes summit is scheduled to run through Friday. The White House says the meeting will focus on economic and security issues.

news.title: Cisco CEO says tech is entering a 'networking supercycle' as stock pops 14% on strong AI demand
news.summary: Cisco blew past its AI infrastructure and hyperscaler orders guidance for the fiscal year. Shares headed for their best day in more than two decades.

news.title: Bessent sees 'substantial disinflation' ahead as Warsh takes over the Fed
news.summary: The energy-fed inflation surge recently is likely to reverse as the U.S. is "going to keep pumping," Bessent says.

news.title: Xi tells Musk, Tim Cook and other CEOs on Trump's trip: China will 'open wider'
news.summary: Tesla and Space X boss Elon Musk, Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang and Apple CEO Tim Cook were part of Trump's delegation. Tesla, Space X, Nvidia, Apple and SpaceX are among the companies represented at the White House.

news.title: U.S. can hold AI talks with China because ‘we are in the lead,’ Bessent tells CNBC as nations plan safety protocol
news.summary: The U.S. Treasury secretary also said President Donald Trump would likely comment on the Taiwan issue in coming days. The president is expected to make a statement on the issue soon.

news.title: Stocks in this sector of the S&P 500 are getting more attractive — here’s why
news.summary: We appear to be looking at an excellent entry point for long-term investors. We are looking at a great opportunity to take advantage of the current market conditions.

news.title: U.S. retail sales rise again, but higher gas prices and inflation play a big role
news.summary: Sales at retailers rose in April for the third month in a row. But the increase was inflated by drivers spending more on gas due to higher prices.

news.title: Cerebras’s stock set to rocket, as early indications point to a near doubling
news.summary: Cerebras’s stock indicated to more than double when it starts trading. Cerebras will be listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CERB.

news.title: We’re in our 40s. Our mortgage is nearly paid off — how should we invest our extra $1,500 a month?
news.summary: “We already deposit $1,000 each month into the American Funds Growth and Income Portfolio Class A fund,” he says.

news.title: 3 financial rules that have stood the test of time — from the person who wrote the book on them
news.summary: Beth Kobliner’s classic tome of financial literacy for Gen X still works today for Gen Z. Beth Kobliner: Financial Literacy For Gen X is still a must-read.
